title: Light Filipino Fenugreek Bowl
description: A winey, light, and festive Filipino dish featuring fenugreek, perfect for low-calorie meals, served in an earthenware bowl.
instructions: Combine chopped fenugreek leaves, minced garlic, and sliced green chilies in a bowl.
Heat rice bran oil in a pan over medium heat.
Sauté the onion until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and fish sauce, stirring constantly.
Simmer for 2 minutes, then season with salt.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve over the fenugreek mixture.
Garnish with additional green chilies if desired.
